arts.ttl: I have just witnessed new Liverpool leader emerge after remarkable candid discussion
arts.sum: Analysis from Anfield as Ibrahima Konate reveals all ahead of Liverpool's Champions League visit from Lille on Tuesday

arts.ttl: 'You can't do that' - Man Utd boss Ruben Amorim slammed by Liverpool legend for comments
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim tore into his Manchester United side after they slumped to defeat against Brighton at Old Trafford and he has now been issued with a scathing response ahead of the midweek clash with Rangers

arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Lille: Predicted lineup, confirmed team news, injury latest for Champions League
arts.sum: Arne Slot could reward Darwin Nunez after his late heroics at the weekend

arts.ttl: Arne Slot responds to Thomas Frank's claim about his Liverpool side
arts.sum: Brentford boss Thomas Frank had some high praise for Liverpool at the weekend after their late, late show in the Premier League - now Kop boss Arne Slot has responded, looking to keep his stars on task

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate on knee injury, playing through the pain barrier and his Liverpool 'sacrifice'
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate returned from a knee injury to play for Liverpool after a number of weeks out

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate committed to Liverpool despite unresolved contract situation
arts.sum: The France international’s deal expires at the end of next season.

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez got the headlines but don't forget Liverpool game-changer who does things differently
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez was Liverpool's match winner against Brentford but he wasn't the only one to perform for the Reds in west London

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota 'out for weeks' as Arne Slot reveals what injury Liverpool striker has suffered
arts.sum: Arne Slot has confirmed Diogo Jota has suffered a muscle injury as the Liverpool boss backs Darwin Nunez to deputise for the Portugal striker in the coming weeks

arts.ttl: Ibrahima Konate confirms he has been offered new Liverpool contract
arts.sum: Reports in France over the last year claimed Liverpool had opened talks over a new contract, one of many Richard Hughes and Co. have to sort with 15 expiring between this summer and 2027. Ibrahima Konate has confirmed that he has been offered a new Liverpool contract, but would not offer any insight into whether he is close to signing it.

arts.ttl: Jota ruled out for several weeks as Liverpool manager Arne Slot provides injury update
arts.sum: The forward has already spent a spell on the sidelines this season and has suffered a muscular issue
